title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE ALEGRIA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ” VERIATO ANNEX IN BARANGAY VERIATO, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ISIDRO, PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR FROM THE ALEGRIA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS VERIATO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 5325; 106 OG No. 7, 901 (February 15, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9825, November 26, 2009 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE ALEGRIA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ” VERIATO ANNEX IN BARANGAY VERIATO, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ISIDRO, PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR FROM THE ALEGRIA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS VERIATO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

ГўВЂВ” The Alegria National High School ГўВЂВ” Veriato Annex in Barangay Veriato, Municipality of San Isidro, Province of Northern Samar is hereby separated from the Alegria National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Veriato National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

ГўВЂВ” All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Alegria National High School ГўВЂВ” Veriato Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Veriato National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Veriato National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriations of the Alegria National High School ГўВЂВ” Veriato Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

ГўВЂВ” The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

ГўВЂВ” This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on December 3, 2008 and August 26, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: NOV 26 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
